name: Jump
description: You touch a willing creature. Once on each of its turns until the spell ends, that creature can jump up to 30 feet by spending 10 feet of movement. Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot: You can target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 1. Engine: jumping isn't modelled by the movement system; the `jumpMultiplier` PlayerState field is a legacy stub from the 5e 2014 rule ("jump distance tripled") and has no current mechanical effect.
